headline: Session 41 completed the mobile General Manager decision fallback path, keeping phone decisions actionable through the existing modal and consequence source of truth.

items.title: mobile-gm-decision-fallback-modal-path
items.evidence: public/app.js now listens for vsfgm:mobile-decision choose-gm-decision events and routes them through checkAndShowGmDecision() plus submitMobileGmDecisionChoice().

items.title: focused mobile-loop coverage
items.evidence: test/mobile-loop.test.js covers the generic mobile-decision app-shell binding; focused suite passes 12/12.

items.title: latest-audit-follow-through
items.evidence: docs/INNOVATION_PACK.md and .cache/genius-list.json show Session 41 exhausted with 0 open items.

followUps.title: email-forwarding receipt
followUps.evidence: Obtain real received-message proof for football@playfranchisearchitect.com before any SPARKED flip.

followUps.title: live-origin/routing proof
followUps.evidence: After deployment, verify playfranchisearchitect.com serves the latest build before launch status changes.

blockers.title: launch/SPARKED evidence gate
blockers.evidence: Email forwarding/copying receipt and current live-origin/routing evidence are still missing.

honestyLedger.title: SPARKED flip rejected
honestyLedger.evidence: No fabricated email receipt or live-origin proof was used.

honestyLedger.title: new mobile backend rejected
honestyLedger.evidence: Existing /api/gm-decision and /api/advance-week gmDecisionChoice remain the source of truth.

honestyLedger.title: local scanner/helper gaps recorded
honestyLedger.evidence: scripts/sample-codebase.mjs, scripts/scan-secrets.mjs, state-vector, entropy, and genome helpers are not vendored locally; Studio Ops equivalent scanner is used before push.

diffStat.suite: npm test 285/285; npm run test:ui 17/17; Pages build/smoke; doctor no items; canon conformance 0 gaps
